selection_notes: This starter cohort spreads samples across distinct 1000 Genomes populations so the repo can exercise population-aware summaries without pretending to cover the full data set.
The final phase of 1000 Genomes used GRCh37 for phase 3 variant calls, which is a practical default for the initial batch query path.

samples.notes: Example sample id visible in official IGSR phased-VCF documentation.
Example sample id visible in official IGSR variation-pattern documentation.
Example sample id visible in official IGSR variation-pattern documentation.

caveats: Population labels are context for summary views, not destiny or phenotype truth.
The starter cohort is intentionally small and should not be described as representative of the full 1000 Genomes resource.
